requirement_topic.en: TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and LEW Installation Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851安全基线与持牌电气工人安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851安全基線與持牌電氣工人安裝要求

summary.en: Singapore's technical reference for EV charging is TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851 (Electric Vehicle Charging System), which aligns with the IEC 61851 series. IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 addresses DC EV charging stations. All EV charger installations in Singapore must be installed by an EMA-licensed Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) in accordance with the Electricity Act (Cap. 89A) and SS 638. Enclosure protection of at least IP54 is expected for outdoor-rated chargers in Singapore's tropical humid climate, and installers must comply with EMA's electrical installation technical requirements.
summary.zh: 新加坡电动汽车充电技术参考为TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851（电动汽车充电系统），与IEC 61851系列标准一致。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车充电站。新加坡所有电动汽车充电桩安装须由EMA持牌电气工人（LEW）依据《电力法》（Cap. 89A）及SS 638执行。在新加坡热带潮湿气候下，室外充电桩预期应达到至少IP54防护等级，安装方须符合EMA电气安装技术要求。
summary.zht: 新加坡電動汽車充電技術參考為TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851（電動汽車充電系統），與IEC 61851系列標準一致。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車充電站。新加坡所有電動汽車充電樁安裝須由EMA持牌電氣工人（LEW）依據《電力法》（Cap. 89A）及SS 638執行。在新加坡熱帶潮濕氣候下，室外充電樁預期應達到至少IP54防護等級，安裝方須符合EMA電氣安裝技術要求。

standards_or_laws: TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851 — Singapore Technical Reference for Electric Vehicle Charging System
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum for outdoor chargers in tropical climates
Electricity Act (Cap. 89A) — Singapore electrical installation licensing
SS 638 — Code of Practice for Electrical Installations (Singapore Standard)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required by TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851, LTA, or an Enterprise Singapore CPSR conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851、陆路交通管理局或企业发展局CPSR合格评定路径所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851、陸路交通管理局或企業發展局CPSR合格評定路徑所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP54 (or higher) test certificates for outdoor-rated chargers, protective device ratings, and installation instructions aligned with EMA and SS 638 requirements. All installation must be performed by an EMA LEW — exporters cannot simply ship and self-install. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 / TR 25 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、室外充电桩的IP54（或更高）测试证书、保护器件额定值，以及符合EMA和SS 638要求的安装说明。所有安装须由EMA持牌电气工人执行——出口商不能直接发货并自行安装。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851 / TR 25合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、室外充電樁的IP54（或更高）測試證書、保護器件額定值，以及符合EMA和SS 638要求的安裝說明。所有安裝須由EMA持牌電氣工人執行——出口商不能直接發貨並自行安裝。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851 / TR 25合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMA requires LEW installation for all electrical installations under the Electricity Act; TR 25 / SS EN IEC 61851 safety evidence required by LTA grant conditions and Singapore project specifications; IP54 minimum for outdoor chargers in tropical climate
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 / TR 25 evidence in Singapore without additional accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Singapore-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, and EMA LEW installation. Self-installation by the exporter or non-LEW personnel is not permitted under Singapore law.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向新加坡的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级认证书，以及EMA持牌电气工人安装。依据新加坡法律，出口商或非持牌电气工人的自行安装不被允许。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向新加坡的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級認證書，以及EMA持牌電氣工人安裝。依據新加坡法律，出口商或非持牌電氣工人的自行安裝不被允許。
